notCapturedByDesign: emergency numbers (legacy e911 provisioning) — portal-only, not in the documented v1/v2 API
voicemail messages (greetings are captured; left messages are not)
recorded names (name.wav has no read API)
domain-level routing outside the default dialplan unless enumerated
